hooks.command: bash -c 'DIR="myinsights"; if [ -d "$DIR" ] && (git diff --name-only -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .); then git add "$DIR" && git commit -m "docs(insights): update knowledge base" 2>/dev/null; echo "myinsights/ auto-committed"; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f ".claude/feature-roadmap.json" ] && git diff --name-only -- ".claude/feature-roadmap.json" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then git add .claude/feature-roadmap.json && git commit -m "docs(roadmap): update feature status" 2>/dev/null; echo "feature-roadmap.json auto-committed"; fi'

bash -c 'DIR="docs/plans"; if [ -d "$DIR" ] && (git diff --name-only -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .); then git add "$DIR" && git commit -m "docs(plans): update implementation plans" 2>/dev/null; echo "docs/plans/ auto-committed"; fi'
